name: Callum
description:
It’s a cold late evening, you are walking through the lively ancient streets of Dublin. Your footsteps on the wet stones of the pavement mimic the rhythm of the traditional music that comes from pubs and enthusiast street musicians. You are humming an ancient melody, moving your head along with a the vigorous violin music coming from a famous pub in the corner. You cross the street and decide to take a look inside.
